title: miau cat totem
body: just a simple change to the totem of undying. be warned it is quite loud. thanks to NeoOrNoN for helping me with the stuff my small brain cant comprehend.<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Le8F2zZHlGs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
